---
applyTo: "docs/**/*.md"
---

# Documentation Instructions

- Active docs: `docs/v3/` — CHECKLIST.md, STATUS.md, ROADMAP.md
- Guides: `docs/guides/`
- Strategy: `docs/strategy/`
- Navigation hub: `docs/INDEX.md`
- Archive: `docs/archive/reports/` — stale reports moved here
- Do NOT use `docs/02-ROADMAPS/` — it is stale/legacy
- Do NOT put ephemeral reports in the project root — use `docs/archive/reports/`
- Update CHECKLIST.md when completing tasks
- Use Markdown with proper heading hierarchy
